mapper.select: /* wif-das-robotdasassort-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultWaveSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasassort-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultOrderSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-robotdasassort-sql-oracle.xml - getRobDasAssortResultItemSeq - RobotDAS Assort Result Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_robdas_prcsrslt_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
